titleStmt.title: SII 26.169: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 169. (A.R. No. 158 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Base of the maṇḍapa in front of the Naṭarāja shrine in the same temple.

p.hi: No king: Ś. 1267, wrong for 1167 (?) Pārthiva.

summary.p: The Śaka year is apparently wrong for 1167 It may be assigned to c. 13th century.
Some of the stones seem to have been lost, and consequently some passages of this record are missing.
It refers to a certain Kettaya-daṇḍanāyakkaṉ, stated to be the eldest son of one ••• ••• •••• tappa-daṇḍanāyakkaṉ who was perhaps a feudatory of the Hoysaḷa king (name lost).

It records that Kettaya-daṇḍanāyakaṉ, for the victory and prosperity of his younger brother Siṅgaya-daṇḍanāyakkaṉ and for achieving all his desired objectives, granted lands, together with all the associated things, as sarvamānya, in Oṭṭaikkumīṇḍāṉ in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu in Koṅgu-maṇḍala, to the mahājanas of Śrīmādhava-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam and of Teṉṉvadaraiya-chaturvvēdimaṅgalaṁ. A certain Kaṇṇappaṉ Teṉṉavadaraiyaṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Śeḻuvaṉūr is stated to have established the village of Teṉṉavadaraiya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. It is also stated that on the occasion of the makara-saṁkrānti in the Uttarāyaṇa of the last Subhānu-saṁvatsara, the mahājanas of Śrīmādhavachaturvvēdimaṅgalam were given some lands as iṟaiyili.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 2 100 6 10 7- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa pārtthiva varṣattu bra pracaṇḍa hoysaḷarājyalakṣmirakṣā tappadaṇḍanāyakkar jyeṣṭhakumāran śrīmanumahāpradhānan kettaya- daṇḍanāyakkaṉ ṉammuṭaiya Anujaṉāṉa ciṅkayadaṇḍanāyakkaṉukku vijayābhyu dayanimittamākavum nammuṭaiya sakalābhiṣṭasiddhyarttham śrīmādhavacaturvvedimaṅgalattu mahājanaṅkaḷukkum teṉṉavataraiya caturvvedimaṅgalattu mahā- janaṅkaḷukkum patraśāsanaṅ kuṭuttapaṭi ceḻuvaṉūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇappaṉ teṉṉavataraiyaṉ koṅkumaṇṭala
karaivaḻināṭṭu Oṭṭaikku miṇṭāṉil kṣetravāṉkaḷāṉa sa� celavaṟuttu pramāṇapūrvvamā māṉa Inta Oṭṭaimiṇṭāṉil puravu Arai Itil muṉṉāḷ subhānu samvatsarattu Uttarāyaṇa makarasaṅkrān=tiyile Inta śrīmādhavacaturvvedimaṅgalattu mahā- janaṅkaḷukku Udakapūrvva Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta puravu kālum Iṟṟai nāḷil Ivarkaḷukku jivanam Aparyyāptamākaiyil Udakapūrvva dharmmadāna Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭutta puravu Araikkālum Iṟṟai nāḷil Ivaṉ vaitta teṉṉavataraiya caturvvedi
mahājanaṅkaḷukku Udakapūrvva dharmmadāna Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta puravu Arai ṭutta puravu Araikkum grāmanirmmāṇama vatta teṉṉavataraiyacaturvvedimaṅgalattukku puravopāti nattam Araikkālum Āka Ippuravu Araiyāluḷḷa natta viḻukkāṭukaḷum naṉcey puṉcey malaikāṭu kāṭṭuvāykkuṭi Iruppu I ta mānilai kamuku teṅku nirurimai nirnilai Aṇaikāl maṟṟum palar Uṭpaṭṭa phalaprakṣaṅkaḷ turavu toṭṭam toṭṭakkūṟu maṟṟum puravopāti Uḷḷa samastaprāptikaḷum Immahā- janaṅkaḷukku dhārāpūrvvamāka dharmmadāna
tākak kuṭuttom Ippaṭi sarvvamānyamākak kuṭutta Iṉnilattil ce ṇṭu miṭaṅkaḷil kuṭi Ēṟṟikkoḷ paṭṭa samastopādhi- kaḷum sarvvamānyamākak kaḻittu Udakapūrvva dharmmadāna Iṟaiyiliyāka kaṇakkilum kaḻittuk kuṭuttom Ippaṭi kuṭutta Ivvakara siddha sāddhya Akṣiṇāgāmi Aṣṭabhoga tejasvāmyamum Ivvakaraṅkaḷil candrādityavarai celvatāka sarvvamānyamāka kuṭuttom Ippatra śāsanappaṭiye cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Anubhavik
Digital edition of SII 26.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
